title: Silky Stir Fry with Bitter Ginger
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with silky and bitter notes, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the bell peppers and bok choy, and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and a pinch of salt. Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Serve the stir fry hot, garnished with sliced green onions if desired.
Cook time may vary depending on the heat and thickness of the vegetables.
